description: Show changes in the git working tree or between commits. Read-only; never modifies the repository.

staged.description: When true, show only staged (cached) changes. Defaults to false (show unstaged changes).

path.description: Optional path to restrict the diff to a specific file or directory.

ref.description: Optional git ref (commit, branch, tag) to diff against. Defaults to the working tree vs index, or index vs HEAD when staged is true.
